abilities.description: Draw a card, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.
Exile another target permanent you own, then return it to the battlefield under your control.
abilities.target_prompt: Select another target permanent you own

abilities.description: Choose left or right. Each player gains control of all nonland permanents other than CARDNAME controlled by the next player in the chosen direction.

effect.description: Choose left or right. Each player gains control of all nonland permanents other than CARDNAME controlled by the next player in the chosen direction.
effect.name: ChooseDirection
